[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001011 3
1 1110000 3
2 1111000 4
3 0101001 3
4 0001011 3
5 1110000 3
6 0111100 4
7 0001101 3

56 65 0100101 3

70 07 0011101 4

35 53 0100100 2

57 75 1010100 3

71 17 1111101 6

47 74 1100101 4
50 05 1001001 3
61 16 0001100 2
72 27 1111010 5

04 40 1111000 4 match 2
15 51 0101001 3 match 3
26 62 0001011 3 match 0 4
37 73 1110000 3 match 1 5
